originalTitle: US launches fresh strikes on Iran, as Trump warns of retaliation for deaths of soldiers
summary: The US says the attacks were aimed at degrading Iran's capabilities to attack ships in the Strait of Hormuz.
content:
The US military says it has begun a new round of strikes against Iran to "further degrade" its capabilities to attack ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

The strikes - the 10th consecutive night of attacks - come after US President Donald Trump vowed to punish Iran for the deaths of US soldiers, two of whom have been identified by the Pentagon.

Trump earlier said Iran had been hit "very hard" the previous night "in honour" of three US soldiers killed recently - two in Jordan and one in Iraq. Iran's military and communications sites were struck.

Iran said it had targeted sites in Bahrain, Jordan and Syria, with President Masoud Pezeshkian saying Iran was now fighting a "full-scale war" with the US.

At the same time, Tehran said diplomatic messages were still being exchanged by both sides through intermediaries, despite a collapse of a ceasefire.

On Tuesday night the Department of Defense confirmed the identities of two of the US soldiers – Pte Isabella Gonzales, 19, from Texas, and Lt Tyler James Feehan, 25, from Hawaii - who were killed in an Iranian strike on the Muwaffaq Salti base in Jordan over the weekend.

US Central Command (Centcom) said earlier a third service member also went missing in action after the attack, and unidentified remains were later found in the area.

Elsewhere in the region, Jordan's military said late on Monday it had shot down three Iranian missiles as sirens sounded across the country warning of incoming fire.

Earlier in the day, Kuwait's armed forces said they had intercepted Iranian drones.

Bahrain said drones launched by Iran had targeted its air navigation systems - but traffic remained unaffected.

On the US strikes the previous night, Iran's semi-official Tasnim news agency reported that several cities had been hit including Tabriz, Chabahar, Konarak, Bandar Mahshahr and Bandar Imam Khomeini.

Iranian state media reported that two oil tankers had exploded as the vessels tried to cross the strait.

Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) said the tankers were going through what it called an "unsafe and hazardous southern route" of the strait and "exploded and were brought to a halt". Centcom disputed the claims.

chineseTitle: 美国对伊朗发动新的打击，特朗普警告将对士兵死亡进行报复
chineseSummary: 美国表示，这些袭击旨在削弱伊朗攻击霍尔木兹海峡船只的能力。
chineseContent:
美国军方表示，已开始对伊朗进行新一轮打击，以“进一步削弱”其攻击霍尔木兹海峡船只的能力。

这次袭击是连续第十晚发生的袭击事件，此前美国总统唐纳德·特朗普发誓要因美国士兵的死亡而惩罚伊朗，五角大楼已确认其中两人的身份。

特朗普早些时候表示，伊朗前一天晚上受到了“非常严重”的打击，以“纪念”最近被杀的三名美国士兵——其中两人在约旦，一人在伊拉克。伊朗的军事和通讯设施遭到袭击。

伊朗表示，其目标是巴林、约旦和叙利亚，总统马苏德·佩泽什基安表示，伊朗现在正在与美国进行“全面战争”。

与此同时，德黑兰表示，尽管停火协议破裂，双方仍在通过中间人交换外交信息。

周二晚间，国防部确认了两名美国士兵的身份——来自德克萨斯州的 19 岁伊莎贝拉·冈萨雷斯 (Pte Isabella Gonzales) 和来自夏威夷的 25 岁泰勒·詹姆斯·费汉 (Tyler James Feehan) 中尉，他们在周末伊朗对约旦穆瓦法克萨尔蒂基地的袭击中丧生。

美国中央司令部（Centcom）早些时候表示，袭击发生后，第三名军人也在行动中失踪，后来在该地区发现了身份不明的遗体。

在该地区其他地方，约旦军方周一晚间表示，在全国各地响起警报警告火力袭来之际，约旦军方击落了三枚伊朗导弹。

当天早些时候，科威特武装部队表示，他们拦截了伊朗无人机。

巴林表示，伊朗发射的无人机瞄准了其空中导航系统，但交通并未受到影响。

关于美国前一天晚上的空袭，伊朗半官方通讯社塔斯尼姆通讯社报道称，包括大不里士、恰巴哈尔、科纳拉克、马赫沙赫尔港和伊玛目霍梅尼港在内的多个城市遭到袭击。

伊朗官方媒体报道称，两艘油轮在试图穿越海峡时发生爆炸。

伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）表示，这些油轮当时正在穿越该海峡所谓的“不安全且危险的南部航线”，并“发生爆炸并被迫停止”。中央司令部对这些说法提出异议。

也门胡塞武装宣布对沙特阿拉伯实施“海上禁运”
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
